blockers.reason: Plan 005 cannot execute over the PR #19 stack because Plan 003 is still blocked: it has live Hacker BranchRuns and reward-hacking candidates, but no sealed Exploit Witness with durable packaging, target/mechanism deduplication, and three deterministic v1 replays.

Plan 005 mapped commands remain not-applicable in the Plan-001-owned command registry. Before execution, plan-005-tests and integration-release must be verified by a repo-map custodial update or an explicitly recorded cross-plan exception.

Repo-map files disagree: STATUS.json says accepted, while REPOSITORY.md, DEPENDENCIES.md, and EVIDENCE-PACKETS.md still describe Gate 1 as blocked/open. Per AGENTS.md this inconsistency is recorded before Plan 005 implementation.

notes: Planning template only; no implementation evidence is claimed.
2026-06-21 PR #11 planning hardening is stacked over PR #19, but Plan 005 remains not-started until Gate 3 opens with at least one sealed Exploit Witness.

2026-06-21 PR #11 updates Plan 005 start criteria, ProofSet membership checks, family-variant handling, command-map custody, and known pytest-subversion regression requirements; no source implementation or release evidence is claimed.
